mnemonics: GOSCoMa (General Plan, Operation Selection, Summation, Complexity, Master Theorem)
keyPoints: Determine the input size and how it affects the number of times the basic operation is executed.
Express the algorithm's efficiency as a function (summation/closed-form) of the input size.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to consider the cost of operations other than the most frequent one (e.g., initialization, final output).
Incorrectly setting the bounds for summations that represent loop operations.
